src:
local_set('theme', 'dark')
local_set('user', 'ada')
print(local_get('theme'))
keys = local_keys()
print('"theme"' in keys and '"user"' in keys)

db = idb_open('notes', 1, '{"stores":["items"]}')
idb_put(db, 'items', '1', '{"title":"hello"}')
idb_put(db, 'items', '2', '{"title":"world"}')
print(idb_get(db, 'items', '1'))
keys = idb_keys(db, 'items')
print('"1"' in keys and '"2"' in keys)
idb_close(db)
